category_sources: source_facts.description says "H.264/AVC encoder"; official VideoLAN page describes x264 as an encoder for H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video streams.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x264; official VideoLAN project page names the project x264.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official VideoLAN x264 page and includes project, source, support, and usage-oriented information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://code.videolan.org/videolan/x264, so repository redetermination was skipped as instructed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official VideoLAN page identify x264 as an H.264/AVC video encoder.
